queries.query_string: condition: 'COVID-19' OR 'SARS-CoV-2'; intervention: 'rapid antigen' OR 'lateral flow'; study type: observational diagnostic accuracy
queries.comment: Most rapid-antigen DTA evaluations are device performance studies published directly to PubMed without CT.gov registration. CT.gov returned no entries with posted 2x2 results panels suitable for primary-tier inclusion.

queries.query_string: condition: 'COVID-19'; intervention: 'BinaxNOW' OR 'Standard Q' OR 'Panbio'; study type: observational
queries.comment: Brand-name searches returned post-marketing tracking trials with no posted DTA panels.

note: Extraction relies on PubMed-abstract back-computation (see pubmed_covid_antigen_abstracts_2026-04-28.json). The dual-source two-tier structure used by the GeneXpert Ultra template is collapsed here into a PubMed-primary single tier because CT.gov returned no eligible records.
